final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit DAC with inverted functionality. When the enable signal is high, the output is set to zero regardless of the input. However, when the enable signal is low, the output directly maps to the input.
module dac (
    input wire [15:0] din,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [15:0] dout
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (enable) begin
            dout = din; // Direct mapping when enabled
        end else begin
            dout = 16'b0; // Output zero when not enabled
        end
    end
endmodule
